provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, thin human male in his 20s with hollow cheeks and darting eyes, wearing threadbare clothes that were once a Compact regulation undersuit but have been patched so many times the original fabric is barely visible, one sleeve torn off and replaced with a mismatched piece of canvas, no shoes just wrapped feet, a crude shiv tucked into a rope belt, no marks no affiliation no identity, someone who arrived in the Reach with nothing and has not yet taken enough to matter

judgment.explanation: Thin young man in threadbare clothes, rope belt, bare mismatched footwear. Background has visible brushwork — closest to painterly of the batch. Perfectly captures arrived with nothing.
